title: PROBLEM GAMBLING TREATMENT - 211info
text: STAYTON OUTPATIENT CLINIC PROBLEM GAMBLING TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides treatment for problem gambling. Offers outpatient services with an option for telehealth. 631 N 1st Avenue Stayton, OR 97383 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Phone: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (971) 772-4309 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 772-4309 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Accepts OHP and private pay DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5:30pm Services: Gambling Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - MENTAL HEALTH AND CHEMICAL DEPENDENCY TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. STAYTON OUTPATIENT CLINIC
